creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/faq/#x-3d-acceleration> concerns 3D hardware acceleration for OpenGL®. 

Answers: 

- include four of the five ports in the x11/nvidia-driver series

- do not yet include the graphics/nvidia-drm-515-kmod family.

<https://www.freshports.org/graphics/nvidia-drm-515-kmod/>
